name: cryptolibrary-simple
postCreateCommand: mkdir -p .bin && curl -fsSL -o .bin/rcc https://github.com/elabit/robotmk/releases/download/v4.0.0/rcc_linux64 && chmod +x .bin/rcc && SPACE_ROOT=$(.bin/rcc holotree vars --robot robot.yaml 2>&1 | grep '^export RCC_HOLOTREE_SPACE_ROOT=' | cut -d= -f2) && ln -sfn "${SPACE_ROOT}" .rcc-env && echo "export PATH=${SPACE_ROOT}/bin:\$PATH" >> ~/.bashrc
